debug_info.goal:
p : IMO2021P5.Position
⊢ ∃ k,
    (IMO2021P5.Position.swapped (IMO2021P5.Position.nth p k) k).1 < k ∧
        k < (IMO2021P5.Position.swapped (IMO2021P5.Position.nth p k) k).2 ∨
      (IMO2021P5.Position.swapped (IMO2021P5.Position.nth p k) k).2 < k ∧
        k < (IMO2021P5.Position.swapped (IMO2021P5.Position.nth p k) k).1

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
let n := 2021
  let W (k : Fin n) := {i : Fin n | (p.nth k) i < k}
  let e (k : Fin n) : ℤ := ∑ i : Fin n, if (i ∈ W k) = (i + 1 ∈ W k) then (0 : ℤ) else 1
  by_contra h
  simp only [not_exists, not_or, not_and, not_lt, not_le, (p.nth _).swapped, ←not_le] at h
  have h_same (k : Fin n) : ((p.nth k) (p.nth k).symm k - 1 < k) = ((p.nth k) (p.nth k).symm k + 1 < k) := by
    specialize h k
    have h1 : (p.nth k) ((p.nth k).symm k - 1) ≠ k := by
      intro h_eq
      have : (p.nth k).symm ((p.nth k) ((p.nth k).symm k - 1)) = (p.nth k).symm k := by rw [h_eq]
      simp at this
      exact (one_ne_zero : (1 : Fin n) ≠ 0) (Subtype.ext_iff.mp this).symm
    have h2 : (p.nth k) ((p.nth k).symm k + 1) ≠ k := by
      intro h_eq
      have : (p.nth k).symm ((p.nth k) ((p.nth k).symm k + 1)) = (p.nth k).symm k := by rw [h_eq]
      simp at this
      exact (one_ne_zero : (1 : Fin n) ≠ 0) (Subtype.ext_iff.mp this)
    rcases h with ⟨h_w1, h_w2⟩ | ⟨h_w1, h_w2⟩
    · exact (iff_of_false (not_lt_of_le h_w1) (not_lt_of_le h_w2))
    · have h_w1_lt : (p.nth k) ((p.nth k).symm k - 1) < k := h_w1.lt_of_ne h1
      have h_w2_lt : (p.nth k) ((p.nth k).symm k + 1) < k := h_w2.lt_of_ne h2
      exact (iff_of_true h_w1_lt h_w2_lt)
  have e_step (k : Fin 2020) : e k.succ ≡ e k + 2 [ZMOD 4] := sorry
  have e_total : e ⟨2020, by norm_num⟩ ≡ e ⟨0, by norm_num⟩ + 2 * 2020 [ZMOD 4] := sorry
  have e0 : e ⟨0, by norm_num⟩ = 0 := sorry
  have en : e ⟨2020, by norm_num⟩ = 2 := sorry
  norm_num [e0, en] at e_total
